events.content:
It appears you are checking for emails but may be unsure where to start. While I can't access your email accounts or read the contents of any messages, I can certainly help guide you on how to check them.

Could you please specify which service you are using for your emails (e.g., Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo Mail)? Once I know that, I can provide more detailed guidance tailored to your specific email client.
